title: Sodium Booster
description: A sodium modpack that significantly boost performance
body:
![Sodium Booster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c33a02df0d140a82d9da6e74e7ab11efabc0322.png)

# Minecraft Lightweight Modpack
Sodium Booster is a finely tuned performance-focused modpack built for players who love the vanilla Minecraft experience but want maximum FPS and smoother gameplay.

This pack carefully combines lightweight optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and Iris, ensuring your game runs buttery-smooth — even on mid or low-end PCs.

## **Features:**
- ⚡ Up to 2x–4x better FPS than vanilla Minecraft
- 💡 No gameplay or world changes — 100% vanilla-friendly
- 🌈 Shader support with Iris + Sodium
- 🧠 Smarter memory usage with FerriteCore & Lithium
- 🪶 Lightweight and clean — no bloat, just pure performance

## **Perfect For:**
- Builders and survival players who want lag-free worlds
- Those who record or stream Minecraft and need smoother performance
- Anyone who prefers vanilla gameplay with boosted visuals

## **Mods Included:**
• Sodium • Lithium • FerriteCore • Iris • Continuity • ImmediatelyFast • Sodium Extra • Fabric API • No Chat Reports • Cloth Config API • Mod Menu • Text Placeholder API

👉 Download Sodium Booster today and unleash your world’s true performance potential!
